forecast.name: Independence Day
forecast.detailedForecast: Scattered showers and thunderstorms before 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 87, with temperatures falling to around 84 in the afternoon. West northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then scattered showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 11pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. North northeast wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 82, with temperatures falling to around 79 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
